defaults.markdownDescription: Default values used for all presentations. Read more in the [configuration docs](https://github.com/mfontanini/presenterm/blob/master/docs/src/guides/configuration.md)

terminal_font_size.markdownDescription: Override the terminal font size when in windows or when using sixel

theme.markdownDescription: The theme to use by default in every presentation unless overridden

ppi.markdownDescription: The pixels per inch when rendering latex/typst formulas

implicit_slide_ends.markdownDescription: Whether slides are automatically terminated when a slide title is found

command_prefix.markdownDescription: The prefix that must be set in all HTML commands for them to be recognized

strict_front_matter_parsing.markdownDescription: This option tells presenterm you don't care about extra parameters in presentation's front matter. This can be useful if you're trying to load a presentation made for another tool

incremental_lists.markdownDescription: Show all lists incrementally, by implicitly adding pauses in between elements

end_slide_shorthand.markdownDescription: Whether to treat a thematic break as a slide end

bindings.markdownDescription: Key bindings for the presentation. Read more in the [configuration docs](https://github.com/mfontanini/presenterm/blob/master/docs/src/guides/configuration.md)

next.markdownDescription: The keys to go to the next slide

previous.markdownDescription: The keys to go to the previous slide

first_slide.markdownDescription: The keys to go to the first slide

last_slide.markdownDescription: The keys to go to the last slide

go_to_slide.markdownDescription: The keys to go to a specific slide

execute_code.markdownDescription: The keys to execute shell code block

reload.markdownDescription: The keys that cause the presentation to be reloaded

toggle_slide_index.markdownDescription: The keys that cause the slide index modal to be toggled

toggle_bindings.markdownDescription: The keys that cause the bindings modal to be toggled

close_modal.markdownDescription: The keys that cause the modal to be closed

exit.markdownDescription: The keys that cause the presentation to be exited
